hook.summary: Poker gameplay with a live reaction and a potential winning hand.
hook.visual_action: Cards are dealt on a digital poker table while a man reacts in a top-center window.

scene_flow: Initial poker hand reveal and community cards showing a 'Two Pair'.
A woman gestures 'shh' and goes 'All In' with a crowd cheering sound effect.
A man gestures 'come here' and also goes 'All In'.
Close-up of a hand holding two Aces being revealed on a purple felt background.
End card with game title and a simulated search bar typing 'Mega Hit Poker' followed by a 'PLAY NOW' button.
audience_proxy: Adults who enjoy competitive social poker and casino-style games.
